_comment: War Loops fidelity signal panel. One control surface: toggle signals, set weights (renormalized over enabled signals), tune the pass bar. Weights are relative.

signals.name: perceptual
signals.note: SSIM: structural similarity to the reference (non-LLM)

signals.name: gist
signals.note: overall resemblance: low-res correlation + color histogram (non-LLM, local, no deps)

signals.name: tokens
signals.note: extracted color/type tokens vs the built .pen (deterministic)
